hooks.command: bash -c 'set -e; INPUT=$(cat); echo "$INPUT" >> /tmp/pharos-worktree-create.log; WORKTREE_PATH=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r .worktree_path); BASE_BRANCH=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r "(.base_branch // .branch // .source_branch // \"main\")"); if [ -z "$BASE_BRANCH" ] || [ "$BASE_BRANCH" = "null" ]; then BASE_BRANCH=main; fi; BRANCH_NAME="agent/$(basename "$WORKTREE_PATH")"; git -C "/Users/ali/git/personal/pharos" worktree add -B "$BRANCH_NAME" "$WORKTREE_PATH" "$BASE_BRANCH" >&2; echo "$WORKTREE_PATH"'

bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); echo "$INPUT" >> /tmp/pharos-worktree-remove.log; WORKTREE_PATH=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r .worktree_path); BRANCH_NAME="agent/$(basename "$WORKTREE_PATH")"; git -C "/Users/ali/git/personal/pharos" worktree remove --force "$WORKTREE_PATH" 2>/dev/null || true; git -C "/Users/ali/git/personal/pharos" branch -D "$BRANCH_NAME" 2>/dev/null || true'
